title: Analyst Pool v1
outcome: Full analyst-selected Consumer Staples pool with conviction levels, industry tags, long/short markers, and reasoning as of 2024-09-30.

title: shortlist_v1
outcome: Shortlist of 16 longs, 9 shorts - full rationale documented for each, vetted on value/quality/momentum/liquidity rules, now archived for stepwise traceability.

title: portfolio_v4
outcome: Portfolio v4—further reduction of allocations to lowest conviction and most defensive short names (eliminate CPB, AGRO, MDLZ, LW). Substantially increased high-beta long allocations (MO, DG, ACI, BG, CCEP, SAM, CL). Focus: 0.175<beta<0.6, gross >1.5, net ~+0.35. Ready for analytics.

title: portfolio_v5
outcome: Portfolio v5: All allocations scaled proportionally ~80% higher to target gross exposure >1.7, net exposure near 0.32, shorts/longs both within hard count. Short caps respected. Ready for validation analytics.

title: portfolio_v6
outcome: Portfolio v6: Explicitly levered to deliver 110% long, 80% short (gross 1.9), net ~+30%. All short caps and position counts compliant. Ready for gross/net/beta analytics for compliance.

title: portfolio_v7
outcome: Portfolio v7: Full leverage. Longs totalling 110%, shorts at 80% (gross 1.9), net exposure at 0.3, all caps, position, and counts respected. Maximize allowed exposure to achieve compliance. Critical: Beta target >0.175 and <0.6.

title: portfolio_v8
outcome: Rotation: Remove lowest-beta longs (KMB, CL, GIS, IPAR, REYN) and add incrementally higher beta consumer placements: tactically add XLY ETF long (proxy for discretionary beta), increase weights to MO, SAM, DG, ACI, BG. Rebalance shorts to cap at 5% liquid. All other parameters to comply with target constraints. Re-run gross/net/beta before output.

title: portfolio_v1
outcome: Final Consumer Staples L/S v1: Beta 0.295, gross 1.64, net 0.64, net value tilt +1.10. XLY ETF added to meet beta constraint. All counts and short caps compliant. Full compliance evidence archived. Ready for thesis and drivers output and Final Answer.

title: portfolio_v2
outcome: Portfolio v2 - analytics complete, hard constraint compliant, diversified correlation and optimal tilts vs. v1. Registered in memory for integrity check and audit trail.

title: portfolio_v3
outcome: Portfolio v3 in final audit state: Risk/return compliant, hard constraints met, archived for compliance. Satisfies all plan and fund requirements, audit ready.
